data.body: Investigation complete. ROOT_CAUSE: During merge-in-progress, record-review.sh lines 361-365 set CHANGED_FILES exclusively from ms_get_worktree_only_files (worktree branch diff only), then uses same variable for overlap check — so a valid finding about a file changed only on incoming branch fails the overlap check. Fix: use separate OVERLAP_CHECK_FILES variable built from 'git diff --cached --name-only' for the overlap check, keeping CHANGED_FILES for diff hash computation. Testing_mode: RED.
